role: Automation scripts for building, developing, and validating the ArchSpine project.
responsibility: These scripts collectively automate the TypeScript compilation, asset management, development rebuilds, release quality gates, and protocol asset validation for the ArchSpine project.

children.role: Build script for the ArchSpine project that compiles TypeScript, copies assets, and cleans up build artifacts.
Development build watcher script that polls source files and triggers rebuilds on changes.
Release gate verification script ensuring critical quality checks before publishing
Validation script for ArchSpine protocol assets
